overview.ko: 나이스정보통신는 Technology 분야 Software - Infrastructure 기업입니다.
overview.en: Nice Information & Telecommunication, Inc. engages in the payment infrastructure business in South Korea. The company's products portfolio includes wired and wireless credit card checkers, POS, multipad, IC readers, and other products.
